title: viola × vaudensis
intro: Viola × vaudensis, also known as the Vaud viola or the hybrid pansy, is a cross between the common pansy (Viola x wittrockiana) and the alpine pansy (Viola lutea). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × vaudensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
